home about research dissemination

Henry Moseley X-ray Imaging Facility, School of Materials

University of Manchester

3.309, Alan Turing building Manchester, M13 9PY


evangelos.papoutsellis@manchester.ac.uk epapoutsellis@gmail.com

Talks

11/2019 Invited talk: X-ray reconstruction and analysis with the CCPi Core Imaging Library, Synergistic Reconstruction Symposium, Chester, UK.
11/2019 Training Course: Introduction to the CCPi Core Imaging Library, Synergistic Reconstruction Symposium, Chester, UK.
07/2019 Invited talk: Infimal convolution regularization for Emission Tomography problems, Applied Inverse Problems, Grenoble, France.
06/2019 Invited talk: Multi-Channel tomographic reconstruction and analysis of the CCPi Core Imaging Library, HMXIF Research Day, Manchester, UK.
06/2018 Spatiotemporal PET reconstruction using total variation based priors, SIAM Conference on Imaging Sciences, Bologna, Italy.
06/2018 Invited talk: Spatiotemporal PET reconstruction using total variation based priors, CaSciModOT, Tours, France.
10/2017 Invited talk: Infimal convolution spatiotemporal PET reconstruction, Faculté de Médecine, Tours, France.
06/2017 Invited talk: Infimal convolution spatiotemporal PET reconstruction, Laboratoire Imagerie Mol'eculaire In Vivo, Orsay, France.
11/2016 Invited talk: An Infimal Convolution BV type model for dynamic PET reconstruction, Institute of mathematics and scientific computing, Graz, Germany.
03/2016 Invited talk: Infimal convolution regularisation functionals of BV and spaces, Institut Denis Poisson, Orléans, France.
01/2016 Invited talk: First-order gradient regularisation methods for image restoration, INSA Centre Val de Loire, Blois, France.
08/2015 Invited talk: Infimal convolution regularisation in image processing, Modern Mathematical Methods in Science and Technology (M3ST), Kalamata, Greece.
04/2015 Infimal convolution regularisation functionals of BV and spaces, the finite case, The 4th Joint British Mathematical Colloquium & British Applied Mathematics Colloquium, Cambridge, UK.
07/2014 Total variation regularisation in PET reconstruction, Young Researchers in Mathematics, Warwick, UK.



Posters

09/2019 Multi-Channel tomographic reconstruction using the Core Imaging Library, TOSCA, Southampton, UK.
09/2019 Multi-Channel tomographic reconstruction using the Core Imaging Library, 2nd IMA Conference On Inverse Problems From Theory To Application, London, UK.
10/2019 Multi-Channel tomographic reconstruction using the Core Imaging Library, The 4th Annual Advances in X-Ray Imaging Workshop, Diamond Light Source, STFC Harwell Campus, UK.
03/2015 Mathematical Imaging: A journey from Theory to Applications, SET for Britain competition, London, UK.
10/2014 Total variation regularisation in PET reconstruction, Workshop on Variational Methods in Imaging, RICAM, Linz, Austria
02/2014 Combined regularisation in image and sinogram space for PET reconstruction, LMS meeting on Sparse Regularisation for Inverse Problems, Newton Institute, Cambridge, UK
